block_00: Why you should pay attention to volume in trading
block_01: We know what you’re thinking: doesn’t the price chart give you all of the information you need? Why is it important to follow trading volume?
block_02: Turns out, volume is a powerful tool that shows market interest. In doing so, it helps identify the strength of a trend to maximize profits or reduce risk. Here are three indicators on the IQ Option platform that can be used to determine volume and understand the market.
block_06: If you are confused about what indicators are for, how to use them, and when it’s better to apply one indicator over another, this article is for you.
block_09: 5 Day Trading Tips You Want to Know
block_10: Even the best trading strategy can deliver poor results if applied incorrectly. Stay on top of your game with these top tips to improve your skills.
